title: Dream of Love
writer: Marian Ainslee, Ruth Cummings, Dorothy Farnum
actors: Nils Asther, Joan Crawford, Aileen Pringle
plot: A duke has deposed Prince Mauritz's father, so Mauritz spends his time in affairs with a countess, the duke's wife and a gypsy girl Adrienne. Years later she is a famous actress in a play resembling the sad story of their earlier ...
